purpose: Blind finished-image scoring procedure for the three private benchmark cases. No raw prompts, private images, or provider credentials are included.
hard_failures: moved or removed fixed opening without explicit owner authorization
moved or removed structural member without explicit owner authorization
moved or removed required access path without explicit owner authorization
moved or removed named keep item without explicit owner authorization
moved or removed vent or visible utility without explicit owner authorization
uncertainty_rule: Unknown clearances remain unverified and cannot silently pass.
program_rule: A benchmark program measures scenario fit; it is not a fixed preservation constraint. Room use may change unless the owner explicitly locks a requirement for that run.

owner_review.status: physical-preservation baseline confirmed; program remains flexible
